nasb.text: But David pursued, he and four hundred men, for two hundred who were too exhausted to cross the brook Besor remained behind.

esv.text: But David pursued, he and four hundred men. Two hundred stayed behind, who were too exhausted to cross the brook Besor.

cnv.text: 有二百人太疲乏，不能渡過比梭溪，就留在那裡，大衛和四百人繼續追趕。
